import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    let n = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    nums = list.push(nums, n)
    i = i + 1
  end
  mut out = ""
  mut j = list.len(nums) - 1
  mut first = true
  while j >= 0
    let v = match list.get(nums, j)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if first
      out = "#{v}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
    j = j - 1
  end
  println(out)
  Ok(())
end
